title: FreezeEvent
description: A governance record that marks an artifact, schema, or workflow as frozen. A frozen artifact may not be mutated without a formal thaw event. Core mechanism of Layer 1 (IAKE-1) stability control.

freeze_id.description: Unique identifier for this freeze event

target.description: The artifact, file, schema, or workflow being frozen

target_type.description: The type of artifact being frozen

frozen_by.description: Actor or agent who issued the freeze

freeze_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the freeze was applied

reason.description: Why this artifact is being frozen (e.g., 'stable for pilot use', 'passed governance review', 'v1 release candidate')

status.description: Current status of this freeze. 'active' means the freeze is in force.

thaw_event_id.description: ID of the audit event or approval gate that thawed this freeze, if applicable

thawed_by.description: Actor who thawed this freeze, if applicable

thaw_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the freeze was lifted, if applicable

thaw_reason.description: Documented justification for lifting the freeze

notes.description: Free-form notes or context about this freeze event
